Combined admin QA bundle captured at .plans/active/admin-polish-bundle/handoffs/qa-evidence/combined-qa.md. Hub gold-standard sweep at iw 460/745/982/1545 holds the wrapper-level padding contract (MainSheet 428/713/950/1400 capped). Per-route shell smoke at iw=1545 across hub/garden/community/vault/actions all render the 1400px cap with zero compounded inset. Hypercerts detail not testable without seeded garden — recorded as data-limited. Follow-up regression: /actions MainSheet overflow at iw≤599 (475 vs 460); recorded per eval AC-4, not a closeout blocker. Validation: plan-hub validate, check:design-tokens, lint:vocab, admin test:hub (87 tests), admin lint (6 pre-existing warnings), admin build (2m58s), shared check:stories, shared test:stories:ci (96 tests, 0 failures) — all green.

/actions MainSheet mobile overflow follow-up addressed. Edit: packages/shared/src/styles/theme.css — workspace-canvas-grid columns changed from `1fr` to `minmax(0, 1fr)` on both desktop (`var(--left-sheet-width,0) minmax(0,1fr) var(--right-sheet-width,0)`) and mobile (`grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr)`) tracks. Live re-measurement at iw=460 on /actions: gridTemplateColumns now resolves to '460px' (was 506.79px), MainSheet w=428 (was 475), no body horizontal overflow. /hub/work at same width unaffected (still 428). Desktop iw=1545 unaffected (MainSheet still caps at 1400). Re-ran ladder: check:design-tokens ✅, shared check:stories ✅, admin test:hub ✅ 87 tests, admin lint ✅ 6 pre-existing warnings, admin build ✅ 46s, shared test:stories:ci ✅ 96 tests. Note: a separate intra-MainSheet content overflow remains on /actions tabs at iw≤460 (AdminTabRail intrinsic width clipped by MainSheet's overflow:hidden frame); that is an AdminTabRail responsive-width concern, not padding compounding, and was left out of this plan's scope.

Codex qa_pass_2 accepted qa_pass_1 and pulled in the residual /actions AdminTabRail narrow-width follow-up. Edits: packages/admin/src/components/AdminTabRail.tsx and AdminTabRail.stories.tsx.
